title: Klondike Gold Rush National Historical Park, Seattle
content: Staff were great. Interactive and informative displays and a great short movie to detail the history and share gold rush experiences. ALL for free / donation.

title: Klondike Gold Rush - Seattle Unit National Historical Park (U.S. National Park Service)
content: An official website of the United States government. **.gov** website belongs to an official government. organization in the United States. ) or **https://** means you've safely connected to. ## Explore This Park. ## Explore the National Park Service. ## A Gateway to a Remarkable Adventure. Merchants supplied people from around the world passing through this port city on their way to a remarkable adventure in the Yukon Territory of Canada. Today, the park is your gateway to learn about the Klondike Gold Rush, explore the area's public lands, and engage with the local community. A ranger holds a door open for people. You set the pace for your Klondike experience in Seattle. The National Park Service is involved in the greater Seattle area beyond our visitor center walls. title: Klondike Gold Rush National Historical Park | Seattle - What to Expect | Timings | Tips - Trip Ideas by MakeMyTrip
content: * Places to visit in Seattle. The Klondike Gold Rush National Historical Park in Seattle commemorates the Klondike Gold Rush of the late 1890s, preserving the stories of the advent of gold prospecting. Visitors can learn about the gold rush era through interactive exhibits, watch a film about the gold rush, and take a guided tour of the historic district. Food tour’s are the easiest way to take a tour, learn about the local delicacies, and the best of all, get great tips that aren’t just “local” tips for tourists, but sometimes, lessons for a lifetime too. It's always a massive learning curve when you leap into the new (which is why it's important to thoroughly research a travel destination before you go.) Some of the important things to keep in mind while deciding on a destination to travel are :- Figure out how to travel to a destination, where to stay and what are the things to do amongst other things.

title: Klondike Gold Rush National Historical Park - Museums
content: FREE small museum with information about the Klondike Gold Rush in Pioneer Square. The exhibit was interactive and engaging!
